nodes.name: 菲利普·斯克莱特
nodes.summary: 菲利普·斯克莱特是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联79种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、褐穴䳍、巴氏穴䳍等79种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Pale-bellied mourner
nodes.summary: Pale-bellied mourner（Pale-bellied mourner，学名 Rhytipterna immunda），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联12个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The pale-bellied mourner (Rhytipterna immunda) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Guyana, Suriname, Venezuela, and possibly French Guiana.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species occupies a small range in southern Guyana and another extends east from northeastern Suriname to northern Amapá in extreme northern Brazil. However, the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society has no documented records from the middle of that range in French Guiana and so classes the species as hypothetical in that country. The pale-bellied mourner inhabits a variety of somewhat open landscapes including savanna woodlands (especially those on sandy soil), scrubby low várzea woodlands, and campina. In elevation it is found below in Brazil and Venezuela and below in Colombia.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L
